summary: Frontend UI Testing Complete: Spacing optimization for Case Detail Overview and Profile page Facebook-style redesign verified. All 13 features tested and working correctly on 390x844 mobile viewport.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Case Detail Overview - All content fits within 390x844 viewport without scrolling
VERIFIED: Event hero banner (175px-322px) shows event type, city, guest count, status message
VERIFIED: RM card (322px-424px) shows name 'Test RM Onboarding', role, and message button
VERIFIED: Schedule Site Visit button (540px-610px) visible
VERIFIED: Ask a Question button (618px-688px) visible - FITS WITHIN VIEWPORT (688px < 784px threshold)
VERIFIED: Sticky 'Message Your RM' button (786px-830px) at bottom
VERIFIED: Stage progress bar shows 'Enquiry Received' at 8%
VERIFIED: Messages section - Compose bar (752px-815px) fits within 844px viewport
VERIFIED: Messages section - RM card with 'Online' badge (green dot) renders properly
VERIFIED: Profile page - Facebook-style cover photo (160px height) with venue banner image
VERIFIED: Profile page - Avatar (96px x 96px) overlaps cover at 108px (52px overlap)
VERIFIED: Profile page - Camera upload button (32px x 32px) visible on avatar
VERIFIED: Profile page - User name and email displayed below avatar
VERIFIED: Profile page - Basic Info form section visible
VERIFIED: Profile tab active in bottom tab bar (filled icon)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo customer data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Spacing optimization and Profile redesign verified. Case Detail Overview now fits all content (event hero, RM card, 3 assistance buttons) within 390x844 mobile viewport without scrolling. Ask a Question button bottom edge at 688px is well within the 784px threshold (before sticky button). Messages compose bar at 815px fits within 844px viewport. Profile page has premium Facebook-style cover photo (banquet hall image, 160px height) with 96px avatar overlapping by 52px, gold camera button, user info below avatar, and Basic Info form section.

features_verified.profile_camera_upload_btn: PASS - 32px gold camera button on avatar
